mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT ( E_ID, E_TITLE, E_CONTENT, E_LONG, E_CREATEDDATE ) VALUES ( #{e_id}, #{e_title}, #{e_content}, #{e_long}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT E_ID, E_TITLE, E_INDEX, E_CONTENT, E_LONG, E_CREATEDDATE FROM EVENT ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(E_INDEX) ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT SET E_TITLE = #{e_title}, E_INDEX = #{e_index}, E_CONTENT = #{e_content}, E_LONG = #{e_long} WHERE E_ID = #{e_id}
